Hardware Component File

EPS4_C1A_Hsevo_SWEET400__V1.1

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference EPS4_C1A_Hsevo_SWEET400_V1.1_20211119T125538.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 742
Receive ID 762
Functional Addr 04
Functional Name EPS

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "ZF  ",
    "soft": "A013N191                        ",
    "version": "A                               "
